name: Tier 2 soft delete undo restores event on dashboard
description: User deletes an event from the event dialog and uses the Undo banner to restore it back onto the calendar

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
Click an empty time slot on the weekly calendar to open the new event dialog
Type Tier2 Undo Test Event into the event title field
Click the Save button in the event dialog
Wait for 3 seconds for the event to appear on the calendar
Click the Tier2 Undo Test Event on the calendar to open the edit dialog
Click the Delete button in the event dialog
Confirm the delete in the browser confirmation dialog
Wait for 2 seconds for the undo banner to appear
Click the Undo button in the deleted-event banner
Wait for 3 seconds for the calendar to refresh
Verify the weekly calendar shows the Tier2 Undo Test Event again after undo
